channel.title: Upgrade Existing OOB :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: Why would do this? Rebuild OOB completely without losing Homepage, Guacamole, and Ansible configs Want OOB built off a newer Ubuntu Template VM Want latest Ansible Scripts Backup Configs Guacamole ​ from Terminal in /home/Fortinet/c_data/guacamole docker compose ps docker compose exec guacamole-sql /bin/sh sh-5.1# mysqldump -u root -p --all-databases --set-gtid-purged=OFF > backup.sql Enter password: password sh-5.1# exit docker compose cp guacamole-sql:/backup.sql ./backup.sql Optional: SCP backup.sql to your laptop ( always good to have a copy off the VM )
